emails.subject: RE: Missing books
emails.body: RE: Missing books Christy, EPMI-LT-WHALW-PRC GAS-ECT-STRATEG-PRC GAS-ENERGYAMER-PRC OIL-NG-HDG-CD-X-GDL These should be included w/ the Natural Gas Financial Desk. Thanks, Errol, X5-8274

emails.subject: RE: Missing books
emails.body: Dear Errol- Thanks for the info. Who is the associated trader with these books?

emails.subject: RE: Missing books
emails.body: EPMI-LT-WHALW-PRC and OIL-NG-HDG-CD-X-GDL are John Lavorato books. The other two are prepay books and are not associated w/ a given trader.
